name: rnapolis

metadata.name: RNApolis
metadata.summary: A Python library containing RNA-related bioinformatics functions and classes

functions.name: rnapolis.rfam_folder.parse_fasta
documentation:
Read FASTA entries from a file.

Args:
    fasta_path (str): The path to the FASTA file.

Returns:
    List[Fasta]: A list of FASTA objects representing the entries in the file.

variables.name: rnapolis.annotator.HYDROGEN_BOND_ANGLE_RANGE
documentation: 90 degrees is ideal, so allow +- 40 degrees
